title: stelis gibbosa
intro: Stelis gibbosa, also known as the Lipstick Flower, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis gibbosa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
